steps.title: Halve the percent increase
steps.content:
The $2012$ to $2013$ percent increase was double the $2013$ to $2014$ percent increase, so the expected increase was:
$$\frac{5\%}{2}=2.5\%$$

steps.title: Apply the expected increase
steps.content:
Increase the $2013$ amount by $2.5\%$:
$$6{,}720(1.025)=6{,}888$$
The answer is B.
